  "decision": "fail",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Temporary bracing was removed prematurely before decking or permanent lateral stability elements were fully installed.",
    "Structural frame is currently unstable and vulnerable to collapse under wind or construction loads."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Evacuate the immediate area under and around the unsupported steel frame.",
    "Re-install temporary bracing or guy cables immediately to stabilize the structure.",
    "Do not proceed with further erection or decking until the frame is secured and verified plumb."
  ],
  "rationale": "Removing temporary bracing before the structure has achieved permanent stability through decking, diaphragms, or permanent bracing violates basic structural safety standards and poses an immediate collapse hazard.",
  "references": [
    "AISC 303 Section 7.10",
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart R (1926.754)"
  ]
}
